calendar.matters:
MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar May-08-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CHARLES NICHOLAS' MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is granted. No opposition filed. The Court signed the order that was sent by email. Judge: Peter J. Busch; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Apr-08-2013 Continued To May-08-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CHARLES NICHOLAS' MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is continued on the court's own motion to May 8, 2013 to give Defendant the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Defendant must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than April 8 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption And Pos

MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is Denied. The judgment debtor failed to show that the money held by the Sheriff is exempt. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/HEK)
